title: Estrogen Craft Refabricated
description: An Ideal Modpack for the Fems who love E and Computers :3
body:
## Estrogen Craft Refabricated

**Original pack (Quilt)**: [Estrogen Craft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/estrogen-craft)  
**Author of the original pack**: [CrebboElodie](https://modrinth.com/user/CrebboElodie)

Estrogen Craft Refabricated is a Recreation of CrebboElodie's Pack with a few improvements and using Fabric

![Estrogen and Computers and a plane are sitting idly by](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/922a57cb205bcbe2ac3a56bfee69400b2f756f54.png)

## Some mods from said pack:
- **Create**: Automate and build machines. + Estrogen mmmm 🤤
- **Farmer's Delight**: New crops and cooking.
- **Better Nether**: A fresh Nether with new biomes (duh :P).
- **Better End**: a reworked End (also duh).
- **Macaw's Furniture**: Stylish furniture for your builds.
- **Terralith**: Beautiful new biomes.
- **Immersive Paintings**: Customizable paintings using image links.
- **Immersive Aircraft**: Build and fly aircrafts like davinci :3 .
- **CC: Tweaked**: Be Funny Lua Programmer :3
